context.projectOverview: agent-bober priority-hub spec. Sprint 4 adds: src/hub/priority-md.ts (PURE renderPriorityMd(ranked, scopeLabel, now) -> markdown string with YAML frontmatter + Dataview table + per-finding rationale; no IO, no re-ranking), kb-hub output path resolution (config.hub?.outVault else <parentOfProjectRoot>/kb-hub, resolved ABSOLUTE; target = <outVault>/priority.md), and `bober hub priority` (general/filtered) + `bober hub decide "X vs Y"` (decision) commands wiring the full collect->scope->judge->render->write pipeline. Missing kb-hub dir => clear error + process.exitCode=1, no uncaught throw.

completedSprints.title: Finding + source + hub list
completedSprints.summary: finding.ts, finding-source.ts (FactStoreFindingSource, HUB_SCOPE), hub.ts (runHubList DI core + registerHubCommand).

completedSprints.title: Collector + resolver
completedSprints.summary: collector.ts (collectFindings dedup), repo-resolver.ts (resolveSiblingRepos), FactStore readonly. hub.ts resolveConfiguredRepos reads raw JSON config (schema strips unknown).

completedSprints.title: Scope + judge
completedSprints.summary: scope.ts (Scope union, parseScope, applyFilter), lenses.ts (catalog+validators), judge.ts (rankFindings(findings, scope, llm, now) -> ranked Finding[], deterministic).

relevantFiles: src/hub/judge.ts (rankFindings — REUSE; produces the order the renderer consumes)
src/hub/scope.ts (parseScope — REUSE to build Scope from CLI args; decide parses 'X vs Y')
src/cli/commands/hub.ts (extend with priority/decide; keep runHubList; add runHubPriority DI core)
src/cli/commands/chat.ts:33-39 (createClient from config chat/planner provider — pattern for the commander action; NOT for the test-facing core)
src/cli/commands/medical.ts:43-86 (handler error discipline: process.exitCode=1, never throw)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (ESM .js extensions, import type, async fs only [ensureDir/writeFile from node:fs/promises], provider-agnostic via createClient, vitest collocated, conventional commits). CRITICAL: expose a DI-friendly runHubPriority core that accepts an injected LLMClient + resolved paths so unit tests run offline with a fake; the commander action wires createClient.
